_meta.description: Manual translation table: Rocksmith gear knob → VST parameter mapping. Keyed by (rs_gear_type, vst_name_stem). Empty by default — curate as you learn what works for your preferred VSTs. The /vst/knob_mapping endpoint reads this; the 'Apply RS settings' button in the song-view panel uses it.
_meta.rs_value_range: Most RS knobs are 0-100 (use scale=0.01 to map → VST normalised 0-1). Some are 0-1 already (scale=1). A few are integer enums for waveform/mode selectors — handle case-by-case.
_meta.vst_param_range: VSTs hosted by JUCE always expose params as normalised 0-1 floats.

_example_curated_mapping_to_get_you_star._note: This is what an entry looks like once curated. Move it to the top-level (drop the underscore prefix on rs_gear_type) when you've verified it sounds right.
